sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'; import { motion, useScroll, useTransform, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; import { ArrowRightIcon, CheckBadgeIcon, ChartBarIcon, ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon, NewspaperIcon, ShieldCheckIcon, UserGroupIcon, DocumentTextIcon, GlobeAltIcon, ClockIcon, AcademicCapIcon, BuildingOfficeIcon, HeartIcon, StarIcon, ChevronRightIcon, PlayIcon, SparklesIcon, FingerPrintIcon, TrophyIcon, FireIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import CountUp from 'react-countup'; import { useInView } from 'react-intersection-observer'; const Home = () => { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(0); const [hoveredCard, setHoveredCard] = useState(null); const { scrollYProgress } = useScroll(); const heroRef = useRef(null); const y = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 1], [0, 200]); const opacity = useTransform(scrollYProgress, [0, 0.5], [1, 0]); const stats = [ { id: 1, value: 225, label: 'Politicians Tracked', icon: UserGroupIcon, suffix: '+' }, { id: 2, value: 1247, label: 'Promises Made', icon: DocumentTextIcon, suffix: '+' }, { id: 3, value: 856, label: 'Promises Kept', icon: CheckBadgeIcon, suffix: '', color: 'text-green-600' }, { id: 4, value: 3452, label: 'Citizen Reports', icon: ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon, suffix: '+' }, ]; const features = [ { icon: ShieldCheckIcon, title: 'Promise Tracking', description: 'Real-time tracking of political promises with verification system', gradient: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500', stats: '95% Accuracy', delay: 0 }, { icon: ChartBarIcon, title: 'Performance Analytics', description: 'Data-driven insights and performance metrics for each politician', gradient: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500', stats: 'Live Updates', delay: 0.1 }, { icon: GlobeAltIcon, title: 'News Integration', description: 'AI-powered news aggregation from trusted Sri Lankan sources', gradient: 'from-orange-500 to-red-500', stats: '24/7 Updates', delay: 0.2 }, { icon: ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon, title: 'Citizen Feedback', description: 'Community verification and democratic participation platform', gradient: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500', stats: '10k+ Reviews', delay: 0.3 } ]; const topPoliticians = [ { name: 'Ranil Wickremesinghe', role: 'President of Sri Lanka', party: 'UNP', promisesKept: 85, totalPromises: 120, rating: 70.8, image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5c/Ranil_Wickremesinghe_2017.jpg/800px-Ranil_Wickremesinghe_2017.jpg', trend: '+5.2%', color: '#FF6B35' }, { name: 'Sajith Premadasa', role: 'Opposition Leader', party: 'SJB', promisesKept: 67, totalPromises: 95, rating: 70.5, image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4f/Sajith_Premadasa_%28cropped%29.jpg/800px-Sajith_Premadasa_%28cropped%29.jpg', trend: '+3.8%', color: '#1B4D3E' }, { name: 'Anura Kumara', role: 'Party Leader NPP', party: 'NPP', promisesKept: 52, totalPromises: 78, rating: 66.7, image: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/Anura_Kumara_Dissanayake.jpg/800px-Anura_Kumara_Dissanayake.jpg', trend: '+12.3%', color: '#800000' } ]; const recentNews = [ { title: 'President Announces New Economic Recovery Plan', source: 'Daily Mirror', time: '2 hours ago', category: 'Politics', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582510003544-4d00b7f74220', url: '#' }, { title: 'Opposition Pledges to Strengthen Anti-Corruption Laws', source: 'The Island', time: '5 hours ago', category: 'Governance', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582510003544-4d00b7f74220', url: '#' }, { title: 'New Initiative for Youth Employment Launched', source: 'Daily News', time: '1 day ago', category: 'Economy', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1582510003544-4d00b7f74220', url: '#' } ]; const testimonials = [ { name: 'Nimal Perera', role: 'Colombo Resident', image: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/1.jpg', comment: 'Finally a platform that holds our leaders accountable. The transparency is remarkable!', rating: 5 }, { name: 'Kamala Silva', role: 'Political Activist', image: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/women/2.jpg', comment: 'This tool has revolutionized how we track political promises in Sri Lanka.', rating: 5 }, { name: 'Dr. Asanka Weerasinghe', role: 'University Lecturer', image: 'https://randomuser.me/api/portraits/men/3.jpg', comment: 'Data-driven approach to political accountability - exactly what we needed.', rating: 5 } ]; const StatSection = () => { const [ref, inView] = useInView({ triggerOnce: true, threshold: 0.1 }); return (
{stats.map((stat, idx) => (
{stat.suffix && }
{inView ? : 0}{stat.suffix}
{stat.label}
 ))}
); }; return (
{/* Hero Section with Parallax */}
{/* Animated Background */}
{/* Animated Circles */}
Transparency Platform v2.0 Track Political Promises in Sri Lanka Empowering citizens with real-time data on political accountability and performance metrics. Join thousands of Sri Lankans in building a transparent democracy. Start Tracking Now {/* Trust Badges */} {['Trusted by 50k+ Citizens', 'Verified by FactCheck.lk', 'Real-time Updates'].map((badge, i) => (
{badge}
))}
{/* Scroll Indicator */}
{/* Stats Section */}
{/* Features Section with 3D Cards */}

Powerful Features for Democratic Transparency

Our platform combines cutting-edge technology with citizen participation to ensure political accountability

{features.map((feature, idx) => ( setHoveredCard(idx)} onHoverEnd={() => setHoveredCard(null)} className="group relative" >

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

{feature.stats}
))}
{/* Top Politicians Section with Interactive Cards */}

Leading Politicians Performance Dashboard

Real-time tracking of promise fulfillment rates
{topPoliticians.map((politician, idx) => (

{politician.name}

{politician.role}

{politician.party}
Promise Fulfillment {politician.rating}%
Kept: {politician.promisesKept} Total: {politician.totalPromises} {politician.trend}
View Detailed Report
))}
{/* Real-time News Feed */}

Latest Political News

AI-curated updates from trusted sources

View All News
{recentNews.map((news, idx) => (
{news.category}

{news.title}

{news.source} {news.time}
))}
{/* Testimonials Section */}

Trusted by Citizens Across Sri Lanka

Join thousands of users making democracy more transparent
{testimonials.map((testimonial, idx) => (

{testimonial.name}

{testimonial.role}

{[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}

"{testimonial.comment}"

 ))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Make a Difference?

Join the movement for transparent governance in Sri Lanka. Start tracking political promises today.

Get Started Now

No credit card required. Free forever.
{/* Floating Action Button */}
); }; export default Home;
